source_notes: Dedicated registry declaring per-harness hook discovery surfaces (file paths, embedding, authority).
Extracted from harness surface audits, discover_surfaces.py hook entries, harness-surfaces.md, and Grok/Plannotator sync logic.
Complements config/harness-surface-registry.json (which declares projection claim via 'hooks' in projection_surfaces).
Intended for use by hook_scan.py, GapReport.hooks population, and harness discovery parity (beyond file-presence only).
Embedded hooks (Claude, Gemini) live inside settings.json surfaces that are typed 'config' in generic surface scans.

hook_surfaces.label: embedded hooks
hook_surfaces.notes: Hooks are embedded under top-level 'hooks' key inside the settings.json (also carries permissions).

hook_surfaces.label: embedded hooks
hook_surfaces.notes: Global hooks embedded in ~/.claude/settings.json; ~/.claude/settings.local.json may carry overrides (secondary).

blind_spots.label: Claude managed policy / enterprise hooks
blind_spots.notes: Team, org, or Claude-managed policy hooks, allowlists, and permission sets may be applied centrally and not reflected (or fully editable) in local settings.json files.

harnesses.label: Cursor Editor

hook_surfaces.label: project hooks
hook_surfaces.notes: Project hooks; Cursor cloud agents may honor repo-level hooks.

blind_spots.label: Cursor team hooks
blind_spots.notes: Team or enterprise hooks may be distributed from admin surfaces / dashboard outside local files.

blind_spots.label: Cursor cloud agent hook settings
blind_spots.notes: Cloud agent hook configuration and secrets may be dashboard-managed and not present in local ~/.cursor/hooks.json.

harnesses.blind_spot: Cursor team/enterprise hooks and cloud agent hook config may be UI/dashboard managed and not visible in local .cursor/hooks.json files.

hook_surfaces.label: project hooks
hook_surfaces.notes: Cloud agents load supported project command hooks, but not every local Cursor hook event is supported in cloud execution.

blind_spots.label: Cursor team hooks
blind_spots.notes: Team or enterprise hooks may be distributed from admin surfaces / dashboard outside local files.

blind_spots.label: Cursor cloud agent hook settings
blind_spots.notes: Cloud agent hook configuration and secrets may be dashboard-managed and not present in local ~/.cursor/hooks.json.

hook_surfaces.label: embedded hooks
hook_surfaces.notes: Hooks embedded inside project .gemini/settings.json (shared surface with MCP, instructions).

harnesses.label: GitHub Copilot Web and Coding Agent

hook_surfaces.label: copilot hooks
hook_surfaces.notes: Generated hook scaffolding for Copilot; not primary execution surface for web agent.

blind_spots.label: GitHub.com / Copilot cloud hook policy
blind_spots.notes: Repository, org, and cloud coding agent hook/approval policies live on GitHub.com rather than local .github/hooks/*.

hook_surfaces.label: grok global hooks
hook_surfaces.notes: Grok reads per-event hook groups from ~/.grok/hooks/<event>.json or individual *.json files under the dir.

hook_surfaces.label: plannotator hook policy
hook_surfaces.notes: Repo-curated Plannotator exit-plan / pre-tool hooks; rendered and synced to ~/.grok/hooks/plannotator.json during home sync (placeholders resolved at sync time).

harnesses.label: OpenCode

blind_spots.label: plugin-internal hooks
blind_spots.notes: No native top-level hooks.json equivalent. Hooks are provided internally by OpenCode plugins (see platforms/opencode/plugins/* and ~/.config/opencode/plugins/*); plugin frontmatter or runtime registration surfaces are blind to generic hooks.json discovery.

blind_spots.label: plugin-internal hooks
blind_spots.notes: Plugin authors may register hooks at runtime; no stable repo-discoverable hooks.json file for OpenCode.

harnesses.blind_spot: No native hooks.json for OpenCode; hooks are plugin-internal (platforms/opencode/plugins/* and global plugins dir); plugin runtime registration is not observable via hooks.json surfaces.
